Finals''' : June 18th - 19th ** 24 teams. ** 2 matchdays. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals. * '''Grand Finals''' : ''June 20th - 22th ** 16 teams. ** 3 matchdays. {{PUBGM
